identity.name: Area 51
identity.core_message: Classified Location. Restricted Access. If you know, you know.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFC107] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#FFD54F] transition-all sharp-edges clip-path-polygon
buttons.secondary: border border-[#FFC107] text-[#FFC107] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#FFC107]/10 uppercase tracking-widest

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 hover:border-[#FFC107]/50 transition-colors duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group
cards.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent opacity-80

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5

testimonials.style: Terminal/Dossier style. Monospaced text, rigid borders, 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure Amber text is on Black, or Black text on Amber. Avoid Amber on White.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable glitch effects if prefers-reduced-motion is true

instructions_to_main_agent: Add the Google Fonts imports to index.css immediately.
Create a 'Noise' utility component for that grainy texture overlay on the background.
The 'WhatsApp' CTA must be sticky on mobile bottom right OR a fixed bar at bottom.
Use 'react-fast-marquee' for a 'RESTRICTED AREA // AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY' scrolling banner.
Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'hero-cta-button', 'amenity-card-pickleball').
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds, use solid dark colors + noise/texture.
Avoid rounded corners > 4px. Keep it sharp and industrial.
Use uppercase text with wide tracking (tracking-widest) for all labels and subheadings.
Never use 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use 'REDACTED', 'CLASSIFIED', or actual copy related to the venue.
